summary: Used the local `cautilus` skill and ran `cautilus skill test --repo-root . --adapter-name self-dogfood-skill-test` against the checked-in fixture `fixtures/skill-test/cases.json`. The checked-in command path behind that adapter is `node ./scripts/agent-runtime/run-local-skill-test.mjs --repo-root . --workspace {candidate_repo} --cases-file {skill_cases_file} --output-file {skill_eval_input_file} --artifact-dir {output_dir}/local-skill-test --backend {backend} --sandbox workspace-write --timeout-ms 90000 --codex-model gpt-5.4-mini --codex-reasoning-effort low --codex-config project_doc_max_bytes=0 --claude-permission-mode dontAsk --claude-allowed-tools 'Bash(cautilus *)'`. The run failed in preflight before producing `skill-evaluation-input.json` because `./bin/cautilus install --repo-root . --overwrite` tried to open `/home/hwidong/codes/cautilus/.agents/skills/cautilus/SKILL.md` and hit `read-only file system`. Recommendation: make the checked-in skill surface writable/materialized, then rerun the same `cautilus skill test --repo-root . --adapter-name self-dogfood-skill-test` command.
